hero_subtitle: SFTY connects wallet risk scores, transaction data and sanctions alerts into one compliance workflow that preserves evidence and supports audit-ready case management.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_title: Wallet screening depends on disconnected outputs
problem_description: Compliance teams lack a unified view as wallet risk data and transaction monitoring results sit in separate systems. This fragmentation slows risk investigation, complicates sanctions exposure reviews and weakens audit readiness across KYT workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk scores, transaction signals and sanctions alerts into one structured workflow that links customers, counterparties and cases for clearer review and stronger audit readiness.
workflow_title: From wallet risk alerts to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk signals from multiple providers and routes alerts through review, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. Structured compliance workflows
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects wallet risk signals and transaction data into structured reviews, cases, decisions and evidence without replacing existing blockchain analytics or screening providers.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs that require structured wallet screening with preserved evidence and controlled deployment for reliable bank due diligence and compliance operations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for wallet screening compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects wallet risk signals, transaction data and sanctions screening into a connected compliance workflow tailored for digital asset businesses like VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure wallet screening workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates provider alerts into structured reviews and cases, applies internal rules, routes investigations, records decisions and links wallets to compliance actions.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve wallet screening evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence-grade case history, decision logs and provider output snapshots to support audit readiness and regulatory review of wallet screening activities.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY operates above existing providers, integrating outputs from KYC, KYT, screening and Travel Rule systems to streamline compliance workflows and data visibility.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace wallet screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements wallet screening providers by turning their outputs into structured compliance cases and reports without replacing the underlying risk or analytics tools.
final_title: Turn wallet screening into structured compliance cases
final_description: See how SFTY connects wallet risk, transaction data and sanctions alerts into reviewable workflows and audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
